id-00001.name: Hover Car

notes.p: Hover cars are quite common in the more settled regions of the frontier. On the heavily citied worlds of the central frontier, they are the preferred modes of transport. Hover cars appear like normal ground cars but lack wheels. Instead, they have a padded hover skirt under which rests either large air fans (which blow air downward with sufficient power to generate lift) or repulsor lifts. Other than their lower maximum speeds and poorer maneuverability, a hover car is very much like a hover cycle. The advantage of a hover car, however, is the canopied crew compartment, which provides protection to those within.

id-00001.primaryfunction: A hovering vehicle common in civilized centers of the frontier. They hover with large hoverfans or by repulsor technology and can reach impressive speeds.
